content.text: {"id":"KB-004","title":"Shipping & Delivery Overview","category":"shipping","summary":"How we ship orders and how to track your package.","body":"Standard shipping takes 5\u20137 business days. Expedited shipping (2\u20133 days) is available at checkout. Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking number by email. You can also track your order in your account under Order History. We ship via FedEx, UPS, and USPS depending on your location and order weight.","url":"https://help.example.com/shipping/overview","last_updated":"2026-02-10"}
